title: Buildington
description: This Modpack includes various full-vanilla supported mods that benefits your productivity of building various structures, editing terrain, and much more.
body:
**Ever felt like Creative Mode could be a lot more fun and easy to build in your worlds?
Well look no further!**

**Buildington** is a modpack that provides various fully vanilla-supported functions that influences your ways of pasting various structures, editing terrain, and much more. This modpack was built for those who want better ways of building your worlds without a sweat!

Important features of the Buildington Modpack:

### Worldmap and Minimap:
- You will be able to teleport to various locations using the Worldmap for quicker access to builds you are far from
- Using the minimap allows you to see much better visual surroundings than a normal map could provide.

### Co-op and Voicechat:
- Easily be able to invite players into your worlds to help with building as well as being able to chat via voice, proximity-wise.

### Litematica
- Easily be able to import your favorite schematics into your worlds via downloaded file or schematic saving features.

### Axiom
- A Unreal Engine type of addition that allows you to roam around the world very quick and use tools that edits all sorts of terrain. Tools such as the brush tool, selection tool, etc.

#### + Many other additions

## List of Mods 
- Feel free to check out their work as well, we should appreciate the features they worked hard for. Consider checking out their outside sources to support their future mod-making.

## Uses
- These mods should be used in Singleplayer worlds or friends worlds. Using the modpack in outer servers will risk your account to get banned from their servers depending on the punishments

## Open-Source
- The modpack is open source and users are allowed to publish modpacks that potentially has better mods, but I do advise you MUST give credit to the people who made the mods you added in your revamped creative packs!

## Mod Owners 
- I did not in any shape of form made any of these mods. All of the mod names, authors and links are listed in the Mod List. Resource packs and shaders owners are listed separately to prevent complications.

## Intentions
- This is for players who are struggling to make a Minecraft map for a specific version, since there isn't a good modpack for excessive vanilla building opportunities. I do not expect to make any sort of profit from any modpacks I publish whatsoever as I want to best for players when it comes to enhancing their gameplay, building, and inspirations for other uses in Minecraft Java Edition
